passage_title: Whatever happened to the Harappan Civilisation?

sentences.sentence: The Harappan Civilisation of ancient Pakistan and India flourished 5,000 years ago, but a thousand years later their cities were abandoned.
sentences.translation: 古代巴基斯坦和印度的哈拉帕文明在五千年前繁荣兴盛，但一千年后，他们的城市被遗弃了。

structure.text: The Harappan Civilisation of ancient Pakistan and India
flourished 5,000 years ago
but a thousand years later their cities were abandoned
their cities were abandoned

difficult_points: but 连接前后转折：文明曾经繁荣，但城市后来被遗弃。
were abandoned 是被动语态，强调城市最终处于被废弃状态。
their 指代 The Harappan Civilisation 所代表的人群或社会。

sentences.sentence: The Harappan Civilisation was a sophisticated Bronze Age society who built 'megacities' and traded internationally in luxury craft products, and yet seemed to have left almost no depictions of themselves.
sentences.translation: 哈拉帕文明是一个复杂发达的青铜时代社会，他们建造了“巨型城市”，并在国际上交易奢侈手工艺品，然而似乎几乎没有留下对自身的描绘。

structure.text: The Harappan Civilisation
was a sophisticated Bronze Age society
who built 'megacities' and traded internationally in luxury craft products
and yet seemed to have left almost no depictions of themselves

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句修饰 society，把文明社会拟人化为行为主体。
built 和 traded 是定语从句中的并列谓语。
and yet 表示让步转折：文明高度发达，却缺少自我图像。
to have left 是完成式不定式，强调“留下描绘”发生在现在考察之前。

expressions.meaning_zh: 复杂发达的青铜时代社会

sentences.sentence: But their lack of self-imagery - at a time when the Egyptians were carving and painting representations of themselves all over their temples - is only part of the mystery.
sentences.translation: 但他们缺乏自我形象这一点——尤其是在埃及人正把自己的形象雕刻、绘制在各处神庙上的时代——只是这个谜团的一部分。

structure.text: their lack of self-imagery
at a time when the Egyptians were carving and painting representations of themselves all over their temples
when the Egyptians were carving and painting representations of themselves all over their temples
is only part of the mystery

difficult_points: 破折号中内容是插入背景，对比埃及文明丰富的自我表现。
when 引导定语从句修饰 a time。
only part of the mystery 表明缺少自画像只是更大谜团的一部分。

sentences.sentence: There is plenty of archaeological evidence to tell us about the rise of the Harappan Civilisation, but relatively little about its fall, 'explains archaeologist Dr Cameron Petrie of the University of Cambridge.
sentences.translation: 剑桥大学考古学家卡梅伦·皮特里博士解释说，有大量考古证据能告诉我们哈拉帕文明的兴起，却相对很少有证据说明其衰落。

structure.text: There is plenty of archaeological evidence
to tell us about the rise of the Harappan Civilisation
but relatively little about its fall
explains archaeologist Dr Cameron Petrie of the University of Cambridge

difficult_points: There is...but relatively little... 构成省略对比，后半省略了 evidence。
its fall 中 its 指代 the Harappan Civilisation。
引述动词 explains 后置，说明整句话来自 Petrie 的解释。

sentences.sentence: 'As populations increased, cities were built that had great baths, craft workshops, palaces and halls laid out in distinct sectors.
sentences.translation: “随着人口增加，人们建起了城市，这些城市拥有大型浴池、手工作坊、宫殿和大厅，并且被规划在不同区域。

structure.text: As populations increased
cities were built
that had great baths, craft workshops, palaces and halls laid out in distinct sectors
laid out in distinct sectors

difficult_points: As 在此表示“随着”，引出城市建设的背景。
cities were built 是被动语态，强调城市被建造出来。
that 引导定语从句修饰 cities，列举城市设施。
laid out in distinct sectors 后置修饰前面的设施或城市布局，表示分区规划。

sentences.sentence: Houses were arranged in blocks, with wide main streets and narrow alleyways, and many had their own wells and drainage systems.
sentences.translation: 房屋按街区排列，有宽阔的主街和狭窄的小巷，许多房屋还有自己的水井和排水系统。

structure.text: Houses were arranged in blocks
with wide main streets and narrow alleyways
and many had their own wells and drainage systems

difficult_points: were arranged 是被动语态，描述城市住房布局。
with 短语补充街道结构，是伴随说明而非从句。
many 指 many houses，说明不少住宅有独立基础设施。

sentences.sentence: It was very much a “thriving” civilisation.'
sentences.translation: 它确实是一个“繁荣”的文明。”

structure.text: It
was
very much a “thriving” civilisation

difficult_points: It 指代 the Harappan Civilisation。
very much 强调判断程度，表示“确实、非常”。
thriving 加引号，突出该文明在当时高度繁荣的特征。

sentences.sentence: Then around 2100 BC, a transformation began.
sentences.translation: 随后在公元前约2100年，一场转变开始了。

structure.text: Then around 2100 BC
a transformation
began

difficult_points: Then 标记时间推进，从繁荣描述转向衰落过程。
around 2100 BC 表示约略时间，不是精确年份。

sentences.sentence: Streets went uncleaned, buildings started to be abandoned, and ritual structures fell out of use.
sentences.translation: 街道不再被清扫，建筑开始被遗弃，仪式性建筑也停止使用。

structure.text: Streets went uncleaned
buildings started to be abandoned
and ritual structures fell out of use

difficult_points: 三个并列分句连续列举城市衰败的迹象。
went uncleaned 表示保持未被清扫的状态。
started to be abandoned 是被动不定式，说明建筑被遗弃的过程开始。
fell out of use 表示功能或用途逐渐消失。

sentences.sentence: After their final demise, a millennium passed before really large-scale cities appeared once more in South Asia.
sentences.translation: 在它们最终消亡之后，过了一个千年，真正的大规模城市才再次出现在南亚。

structure.text: After their final demise
a millennium passed
before really large-scale cities appeared once more in South Asia

difficult_points: their 指代哈拉帕城市或文明。
before 引导时间状语从句，强调大规模城市再次出现之前隔了很久。
once more 表示“再次”，暗示南亚曾经已有大型城市。

sentences.sentence: Some have claimed that major glacier-fed rivers changed their course, dramatically affecting the water supply and agriculture; or that the cities could not cope with an increasing population, they exhausted their resource base, the trading economy broke down or they succumbed to invasion and conflict; and yet others that climate change caused an environmental change that affected food and water provision.
sentences.translation: 有人声称，主要由冰川补给的河流改变了流向，从而极大影响了供水和农业；也有人认为城市无法应对不断增长的人口，它们耗尽了资源基础，贸易经济崩溃，或屈服于入侵和冲突；还有人认为气候变化导致了影响食物和水供给的环境变化。

structure.text: Some have claimed
that major glacier-fed rivers changed their course, dramatically affecting the water supply and agriculture
dramatically affecting the water supply and agriculture
or that the cities could not cope with an increasing population
they exhausted their resource base, the trading economy broke down or they succumbed to invasion and conflict
and yet others that climate change caused an environmental change that affected food and water provision

difficult_points: Some have claimed 后面串联多个解释哈拉帕衰落的假说。
dramatically affecting... 是现在分词短语，说明河流改道造成的结果。
could not cope with、exhausted、broke down、succumbed to 是一组关于城市压力的解释。
and yet others that... 是省略结构，相当于 and yet others have claimed that...

sentences.sentence: 'It is unlikely that there was a single cause for the decline of the civilisation.
sentences.translation: “这个文明的衰落不太可能只有单一原因。

structure.text: It is unlikely
that there was a single cause for the decline of the civilisation
for the decline of the civilisation

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正内容是 that 从句。
a single cause 表示单一原因，Petrie 在否定单因解释。
decline of the civilisation 是名词结构，表示文明衰落。

sentences.sentence: But the fact is, until now, we have had little solid evidence from the area for most of the key elements,' said Petrie.
sentences.translation: 但事实是，到目前为止，我们几乎没有来自该地区、能支持大多数关键因素的可靠证据。”皮特里说。

structure.text: the fact is
until now
we have had little solid evidence from the area for most of the key elements
said Petrie

difficult_points: the fact is 后省略 that，引出 Petrie 强调的事实。
until now 与现在完成时 have had 搭配，表示截至目前证据不足。
little solid evidence 表示可靠证据很少，而不是完全没有证据。
said Petrie 是引语后的倒装式引述结构。

sentences.sentence: 'A lot of the archaeological debate has really only been well- argued speculation.'
sentences.translation: “很多考古学争论其实只是论证充分的推测。”

structure.text: A lot of the archaeological debate
has really only been
well- argued speculation

difficult_points: has been 是现在完成时，说明此前的讨论长期停留在推测层面。
really only 强调“其实不过是”，语气较强。
well- argued speculation 指论证看似充分但仍缺乏实证支持的推测。

sentences.sentence: A research team led by Petrie, together with Dr Ravindanath Singh of Banaras Hindu University in India, found early in their investigations that many of the archaeological sites were not where they were supposed to be, completely altering understanding of the way that this region was inhabited in the past.
sentences.translation: 由皮特里领导、并与印度贝拿勒斯印度大学的拉温达纳特·辛格博士合作的研究团队，在调查早期就发现，许多考古遗址并不在它们原本应在的位置，这完全改变了人们对该地区过去居住方式的理解。

structure.text: A research team led by Petrie
together with Dr Ravindanath Singh of Banaras Hindu University in India
found early in their investigations
that many of the archaeological sites were not where they were supposed to be
where they were supposed to be
completely altering understanding of the way that this region was inhabited in the past

difficult_points: led by Petrie 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 A research team。
together with... 是插入的伴随合作信息，主语核心仍是 team。
that 引导 found 的宾语从句，说明早期发现的内容。
completely altering... 是结果状语，说明位置错误对理解造成的影响。

sentences.sentence: When they carried out a survey of how the larger area was settled in relation to sources of water, they found inaccuracies in the published geographic locations of ancient settlements ranging from several hundred metres to many kilometres.
sentences.translation: 当他们开展一项关于更大区域如何相对于水源被定居的调查时，他们发现已发表的古代聚落地理位置存在误差，误差范围从几百米到许多公里不等。

structure.text: When they carried out a survey of how the larger area was settled in relation to sources of water
how the larger area was settled in relation to sources of water
they found inaccuracies
in the published geographic locations of ancient settlements
ranging from several hundred metres to many kilometres

difficult_points: When 从句说明发现误差的调查背景。
how 引导名词性从句，作 a survey of 的宾语。
was settled 是被动语态，表示该区域被人定居的方式。
ranging from...to... 后置说明 inaccuracies 的幅度。

sentences.sentence: They realized that any attempts to use the existing data were likely to be fundamentally flawed.
sentences.translation: 他们意识到，任何使用现有数据的尝试都很可能存在根本性缺陷。

structure.text: They realized
that any attempts to use the existing data were likely to be fundamentally flawed
to use the existing data
were likely to be fundamentally flawed

difficult_points: that 引导 realized 的宾语从句。
to use the existing data 后置修饰 attempts，说明尝试的内容。
were likely to be 表示很可能处于某种状态。
fundamentally flawed 强调问题是根本性的，而非小误差。

sentences.sentence: Over the course of several seasons of fieldwork they carried out new surveys, finding an astonishing 198 settlement sites that were previously unknown.
sentences.translation: 在几个田野工作季期间，他们开展了新的调查，发现了令人惊讶的198个此前未知的聚落遗址。

structure.text: Over the course of several seasons of fieldwork
they carried out new surveys
finding an astonishing 198 settlement sites that were previously unknown
that were previously unknown

difficult_points: Over the course of... 表示调查持续跨越多个田野季。
finding... 是现在分词短语，说明新调查带来的结果。
that were previously unknown 修饰 settlement sites，强调这些遗址此前未被记录。

sentences.sentence: Now, research published by Dr Yama Dixit and Professor David Hodell, both from Cambridge's Department of Earth Sciences, has provided the first definitive evidence for climate change affecting the plains of north-western India, where hundreds of Harappan sites are known to have been situated.
sentences.translation: 如今，剑桥大学地球科学系的亚马·迪克西特博士和大卫·霍德尔教授发表的研究，为气候变化影响印度西北部平原提供了第一份确凿证据，而那里已知分布着数百处哈拉帕遗址。

structure.text: research published by Dr Yama Dixit and Professor David Hodell
both from Cambridge's Department of Earth Sciences
has provided the first definitive evidence
for climate change affecting the plains of north-western India
where hundreds of Harappan sites are known to have been situated

difficult_points: published by... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 research。
both from... 是同位补充，说明两位研究者的机构背景。
has provided 使用现在完成时，强调研究对当前证据状态的贡献。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，说明 north-western India 的考古背景。

expressions.text: are known to have been situated

sentences.sentence: The researchers gathered shells of Melanoides tuberculata snails from the sediments of an ancient lake and used geochemical analysis as a means of tracing the climate history of the region.
sentences.translation: 研究人员从一个古湖泊的沉积物中收集了瘤黑螺的贝壳，并使用地球化学分析作为追踪该地区气候历史的方法。

structure.text: The researchers
gathered shells of Melanoides tuberculata snails from the sediments of an ancient lake
and used geochemical analysis
as a means of tracing the climate history of the region

difficult_points: gathered 和 used 是并列谓语，描述研究方法的两个步骤。
from the sediments of an ancient lake 说明样本来源。
as a means of... 表示使用地球化学分析的目的或功能。

sentences.sentence: 'As today, the major source of water into the lake is likely to have been the summer monsoon,' says Dixit.
sentences.translation: 迪克西特说：“和今天一样，进入湖泊的主要水源很可能曾是夏季季风。”

structure.text: As today
the major source of water into the lake
is likely to have been
the summer monsoon
says Dixit

difficult_points: As today 是省略比较结构，表示古代情况与今天相似。
is likely to have been 是不定式完成式，推测过去的主要水源。
says Dixit 是引语后的倒装式引述结构。

sentences.sentence: 'But we have observed that there was an abrupt change about 4,100 years ago, when the amount of evaporation from the lake exceeded the rainfall一 indicative of a drought.'
sentences.translation: “但我们观察到，大约4100年前发生了一次突然变化，当时湖泊的蒸发量超过降雨量——这表明发生了干旱。”

structure.text: we have observed
that there was an abrupt change about 4,100 years ago
when the amount of evaporation from the lake exceeded the rainfall
indicative of a drought

difficult_points: have observed 后接 that 宾语从句，报告研究观察结果。
when 引导定语从句修饰 about 4,100 years ago，对时间点作具体说明。
exceeded 表示蒸发量超过降雨量，是判断干旱的关键证据。
indicative of a drought 是形容词短语，说明这一变化所指示的气候状态。

sentences.sentence: Hodell adds: 'We estimate that the weakening of the Indian summer monsoon climate lasted about 200 years before recovering to the previous conditions, which we still see today.'
sentences.translation: 霍德尔补充说：“我们估计，印度夏季季风气候的减弱持续了约200年，之后恢复到我们今天仍能看到的先前状态。”

structure.text: Hodell adds
We estimate
that the weakening of the Indian summer monsoon climate lasted about 200 years before recovering to the previous conditions
before recovering to the previous conditions
which we still see today

difficult_points: adds 后的冒号引出直接引语。
that 引导 estimate 的宾语从句，报告估计内容。
before recovering... 表示季风减弱持续一段时间后恢复。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 previous conditions。

sentences.sentence: It has long been thought that other great Bronze Age civilisations also declined at a similar time, with a global-scale climate event being seen as the cause.
sentences.translation: 长期以来，人们一直认为其他伟大的青铜时代文明也在相近时期衰落，而一个全球尺度的气候事件被视为原因。

structure.text: It has long been thought
that other great Bronze Age civilisations also declined at a similar time
with a global-scale climate event being seen as the cause
being seen as the cause

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正内容。
has long been thought 是现在完成时被动语态，表示长期以来的学界看法。
with...being seen as... 是 with 复合结构，补充说明被认为的原因。
global-scale 强调气候事件的范围很大。

sentences.sentence: While it is possible that these local-scale processes were linked, the real archaeological interest lies in understanding the impact of these larger-scale events on different environments and different populations.
sentences.translation: 虽然这些局部尺度的过程可能相互关联，但真正的考古学兴趣在于理解这些更大尺度事件对不同环境和不同人群的影响。

structure.text: While it is possible that these local-scale processes were linked
it is possible
that these local-scale processes were linked
the real archaeological interest lies in understanding the impact of these larger-scale events on different environments and different populations
understanding the impact of these larger-scale events

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，承认局部过程可能有关联。
it is possible that... 中 it 是形式主语，that 从句为真正内容。
lies in 后接动名词 understanding，表示真正兴趣所在。
different environments and different populations 是影响对象的并列结构。

sentences.sentence: 'Considering the vast area of the Harappan Civilisation with its variable weather systems, 'explains Singh, 'it is essential that we obtain more climate data from areas close to the two great cities at Mohenjodaro and Harappa and also from the Indian Punjab.'
sentences.translation: 辛格解释说：“考虑到哈拉帕文明地域广阔、天气系统多变，我们必须从摩亨佐-达罗和哈拉帕这两座大城市附近地区以及印度旁遮普获取更多气候数据。”

structure.text: Considering the vast area of the Harappan Civilisation with its variable weather systems
explains Singh
it is essential
that we obtain more climate data from areas close to the two great cities at Mohenjodaro and Harappa and also from the Indian Punjab
from areas close to the two great cities at Mohenjodaro and Harappa and also from the Indian Punjab

difficult_points: Considering... 是现在分词短语，表示作出判断时考虑到的背景。
explains Singh 插入在引语中间，是引述结构。
it is essential that... 中 it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正内容。
from areas... and also from... 并列说明需要获取数据的地点。

sentences.sentence: Petrie and Singh's team is now examining archaeological records and trying to understand details of how people led their lives in the region five millennia ago.
sentences.translation: 皮特里和辛格的团队现在正在考察考古记录，并试图理解五千年前该地区人们生活方式的细节。

structure.text: Petrie and Singh's team
is now examining archaeological records
and trying to understand details
of how people led their lives in the region five millennia ago
how people led their lives in the region five millennia ago

difficult_points: is now examining 和 trying 共用主语 team，表示当前正在进行的研究。
how 引导名词性从句，作 details of 的内容。
led their lives 表示“过生活”，关注古人实际生活方式。

sentences.sentence: They are analysing grains cultivated at the time, and trying to work out whether they were grown under extreme conditions of water stress, and whether they were adjusting the combinations of crops they were growing for different weather systems.
sentences.translation: 他们正在分析当时种植的谷物，并试图弄清这些谷物是否是在极端水分压力条件下生长的，以及人们是否在针对不同天气系统调整所种作物的组合。

structure.text: They are analysing grains cultivated at the time
cultivated at the time
and trying to work out
whether they were grown under extreme conditions of water stress
whether they were adjusting the combinations of crops they were growing for different weather systems
they were growing

difficult_points: cultivated at the time 是过去分词短语，修饰 grains。
work out 后接两个 whether 从句，表示研究要弄清的两个问题。
第一个 they 指 grains，第二个 they 指当时的人群，需要根据语境区分。
they were growing 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 crops。

sentences.sentence: They are also looking at whether the types of pottery used, and other aspects of their material culture, were distinctive to specific regions or were more similar across larger areas.
sentences.translation: 他们也在考察所使用的陶器类型以及物质文化的其他方面，是不是具有特定区域的独特性，还是在更大范围内更为相似。

structure.text: They are also looking at
whether the types of pottery used, and other aspects of their material culture, were distinctive to specific regions or were more similar across larger areas
the types of pottery used
and other aspects of their material culture
were distinctive to specific regions or were more similar across larger areas

difficult_points: look at 后接 whether 从句，表示考察一个尚未确定的问题。
used 是过去分词，后置修饰 pottery。
and other aspects... 是插入式并列主语，与 types of pottery 一起作 whether 从句主语。
distinctive to 与 more similar across 构成区域差异与跨区域相似的对比。

sentences.sentence: This gives us insight into the types of interactive networks that the population was involved in, and whether those changed.
sentences.translation: 这让我们了解该人群参与的互动网络类型，以及这些网络是否发生了变化。

structure.text: This
gives us insight into
the types of interactive networks that the population was involved in
that the population was involved in
and whether those changed

difficult_points: This 指前面关于作物、陶器和物质文化的分析。
give us insight into 是固定表达，表示帮助理解。
that 引导定语从句修饰 networks，介词 in 保留在从句末尾。
whether those changed 与前面的 network types 一起构成研究能揭示的内容。

sentences.sentence: Petrie believes that archaeologists are in a unique position to investigate how past societies responded to environmental and climatic change.
sentences.translation: 皮特里认为，考古学家处在一个独特的位置，可以研究过去的社会如何应对环境和气候变化。

structure.text: Petrie believes
that archaeologists are in a unique position to investigate how past societies responded to environmental and climatic change
to investigate how past societies responded to environmental and climatic change
how past societies responded to environmental and climatic change

difficult_points: believes 后接 that 宾语从句，表达 Petrie 的观点。
in a unique position to... 表示具有独特条件去做某事。
how 引导名词性从句，作 investigate 的宾语。
environmental and climatic change 是并列修饰，指环境变化和气候变化。

sentences.sentence: 'By investigating responses to environmental pressures and threats, we can learn from the past to engage with the public, and the relevant governmental and administrative bodies, to be more proactive in issues such as the management and administration of water supply, the balance of urban and rural development, and the importance of preserving cultural heritage in the future.'
sentences.translation: “通过研究人们对环境压力和威胁的反应，我们可以从过去汲取经验，与公众以及相关政府和行政机构沟通，从而在水资源供应的管理与行政、城乡发展平衡以及未来保护文化遗产的重要性等问题上更加主动。”

structure.text: By investigating responses to environmental pressures and threats
we can learn from the past
to engage with the public, and the relevant governmental and administrative bodies
to be more proactive in issues such as the management and administration of water supply, the balance of urban and rural development, and the importance of preserving cultural heritage in the future
preserving cultural heritage in the future

difficult_points: By investigating... 是方式状语，说明如何从过去学习。
to engage with... 和 to be more proactive... 是两个目的不定式，说明学习过去的现实意义。
the public 与 the relevant governmental and administrative bodies 是 engage with 的并列对象。
such as 后列举三个议题：水资源管理、城乡发展平衡、文化遗产保护。
